title: Bridgestone: War-Driven Selloff May Be Creating A Contrarian Buy Opportunity
article_text: Bridgestone faces macro headwinds, flat sales, and margin pressures, but cost optimization supports a contrarian buy rating. 2025 results showed flat sales at ¥4.4 trillion, with premium tire focus and factory closures offsetting sluggish demand and tariffs. 2026 guidance anticipates 2% sales growth, 4% profit increase, and margin expansion, driven by premium segments and cost reductions despite oil-linked input risks.

title: TireHub Broadens Premium Portfolio by Adding Pirelli
article_text: ATLANTA--(BUSINESS WIRE)--TireHub, the national tire distributor co-founded by The Goodyear Tire & Rubber Company (Goodyear) and Bridgestone Americas Inc. (Bridgestone), will begin distributing Pirelli tires in early 2025. The addition of Pirelli, a global tire brand known for its cutting-edge technology, high-end production excellence and passion for innovation, further reinforces TireHub's position as the leading distributor of premium products with a broad range of top-performing tires a.

title: Bridgestone: Trump Might Ease Thai Import Pressure
article_text: Bridgestone benefits from potential Trump tariffs, reducing competition from low-cost Thai imports present, especially in US and LatAm markets. Specialty tyre segment shows solid growth due to increased air traffic post-COVID, boosting demand for higher-margin products. Bridgestone's significant US manufacturing footprint minimizes tariff impact, consistent with their results being heavily dependent on US dealer demand.

title: Tire Producers: Healthy Dividends With Defensive History
article_text: The tire manufacturing industry deserves the attention of defense minded investors looking for safe yield. Tire manufacturers' revenue and margins have been broadly stable through recent economic upsets; a tire's limited service life is independent of economic cycles. Five tire manufacturers offering yields of up to 4.1% were evaluated using a relative quality matrix with factors including valuation, growth, profitability, net debt, yield, and payout ratio.

title: Bridgestone: Pressure From Low-Cost Thai Imports In Key Markets
article_text: Bridgestone was dealing with pressure from hoarding by distributors of competing Thai products instead of their own, particularly in the truck and bus market. This skewed the mix away from higher value products like those of the Firestone brand. The higher exposure to the Americas has made Bridgestone worse hit by these effects.

title: Indy Autonomous Challenge AI Racecar Presented by Bridgestone Sets Autonomous Hillclimb Record at the Goodwood Festival of Speed
article_text: GOODWOOD, England--(BUSINESS WIRE)--On a busy Sunday afternoon, in front of a global audience of motorsport enthusiasts, The Indy Autonomous Challenge's (IAC) self-driving AV-24 racecar set the record for the fastest autonomous Hillclimb at the Festival of Speed. The AV-24 is piloted by an AI Driver developed by Team PoliMOVE-MSU (Politecnico di Milano and Michigan State University). The AV-24 performed a series of three runs during the iconic festival. The record was broken during their third.

title: The Indy Autonomous Challenge Presented by Bridgestone Returns to Goodwood Festival of Speed in July 2024
article_text: GOODWOOD, England--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Returning to showcase the World's Fastest Autonomous Racecar, the Indy Autonomous Challenge (IAC), presented by Bridgestone, will take on the hillclimb at the Goodwood Festival of Speed presented by Mastercard from July 11th to July 14th, 2024. This year, the IAC's AV-24 fully autonomous racecar will be piloted by software from the PoliMOVE-MSU team, with support from the UNIMORE Racing team. The IAC has developed the AV-24, a fully autonomous racecar utilizi.

title: Bridgestone Recognized as Top Global Supplier by General Motors
article_text: Bridgestone was named as one of General Motors' top global suppliers of 2023, marking the company's ninth consecutive and 22nd overall recognition for this award. Bridgestone and Firestone brands recently developed cutting-edge tire technologies for General Motors, including key fitments for the Chevrolet Blazer EV and Chevrolet Blazer EV Police Pursuit vehicles.

title: Bridgestone Completes Sale of Russian Assets to S8 Capital
article_text: BRUSSELS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Bridgestone Europe NV/SA announced the sale of its Russian assets to S8 Capital, a Russian diversified holding company. The deal has received all necessary regulatory approvals. The agreement includes a tyre manufacturing plant in Ulyanovsk and a sales and marketing office in Moscow. Bridgestone has been present in Russia since 1998. The company suspended all manufacturing activities in Russia in March last year. As part of the deal, about 1000 employees will transfer.
